見てよ、この剣！ 刃こぼれが完璧に修復されてる！<br>ここの鍛冶屋、メチャメチ:
Hey, look at this sword! The nicks are perfectly fixed! This
blacksmith's incredible!
剣はサムライの魂だからな！<br>綺麗に修復してくれて本当に助かるよ！: A sword's a samurai's soul! Glad they fixed it so well!
司令官の武器は、やっぱりその頭だよな？<br>どうやって磨くんだ？ 毎日、研いだ:
The young master's weapon's that head of yours, right? How d'you
polish it? Sharpen it every day?
まぁ、いいや。とにかく、あの時みたいに、<br>司令官の頭脳と、あたしの剣の腕、:
Well, whatever. Anyway, like back then—the young master's brains and
my sword arm together make us unstoppable!
だから、忘れるなよ。この剣は、常に司令官の指揮と共にある。<br>あたしの魂をお:
So don't forget. This sword's always at the young master's command.
I've entrusted you with my soul. Use it as you like!
